A.label: Primary — highest commercial value
A.rationale: BDM priority services; highest average job value in Melbourne residential HVAC. Ducted heating and AC installation are the dominant search categories in the Bayside corridor.

B.label: Secondary — meaningful but lower volume
B.rationale: Offered services with real search volume but lower job frequency than primary services. Hydronic heating is a premium niche in the Bayside corridor (heritage homes in Brighton, Toorak, Malvern).

C.label: Long-tail / informational support
C.rationale: Important content pillars but not primary traffic drivers at Melbourne-wide level. Covered via location pages and content.

general_keywords_plan.notes: 5 general Melbourne-wide keywords targeting the four Tier A services plus one Tier B. Focus on highest commercial-intent terms with proven volume.

proposed.rationale: Highest-value service; 720 preliminary monthly searches Melbourne. Non-negotiable Tier A pillar.
2,400 preliminary monthly searches; highest volume in seed set. Core commercial intent.
590 preliminary monthly searches; strong commercial intent; explicit install action modifier.
1,600 preliminary monthly searches; broad catch-all for brand-awareness and general intent.
1,000 preliminary monthly searches; premium niche keyword with strong fit for Bayside heritage home demographic.

location_keywords_plan.service_assignment_logic: Each suburb is assigned the primary service most commercially relevant to that suburb's housing stock and competitor landscape. BDM priority corridor suburbs (St Kilda, Brighton, Sandringham, Moorabbin) receive highest-value services first.
